items.title: Isolated R-v2 subagent spawn pattern
deliverables: us-equity-research/references/r-v2-isolated-attack-us.md (new, ~250 lines)
us-equity-research/references/phase-3-valuation-us.md (R-v2 section update)
us-equity-research/references/phase-2-continuation-us.md (A-Consensus output structure note)
items.commit_message: Sprint 3a Item 1: isolated R-v2 subagent spawn pattern + 5-point attack methodology documentation
items.session_notes: Item 1 completed under Path A (local commit only, no push). Delivered new reference us-equity-research/references/r-v2-isolated-attack-us.md (203 lines: subagent spawn contract, 5-point attack methodology in execution form with per-dimension worked examples, win condition, independent-source-reverification requirement, bounded 30-50K-token context, variance_attack output schema incl. the v0.4.0 attacker_* fields, and spawn-failure->demote-to-load_bearing=false->G15 remediation). Wired R-v2 isolated dispatch into phase-3-valuation-us.md (two-hat split; Task dispatch; default attacker_model=claude-sonnet-4-6) and added A-Consensus self-containment requirement + isolated-dispatch note to phase-2-continuation-us.md (Step 8 rewrite + deliverable-6 note). Documentation-only: attacker_* schema fields land in Item 2, G20 graduated rigor in Item 3; new file forward-references both. Verified: markdown fences balanced in all 3 files, embedded JSON example parses, cross-refs resolve in both directions. Commit 96219df (deliverables); 126cc4d (in-progress marker). ENV CAVEAT for future sessions: repo mount denies unlink on .git/* including lockfiles, so plain git add/commit fail with 'Unable to create index.lock: File exists' after the first op leaves a stale lock. Workaround used and proven: export GIT_INDEX_FILE=/tmp/uer-idx-$$, rename-aside stale ref locks (.git/index.lock,.git/HEAD.lock,.git/refs/heads/main.lock,.git/objects/maintenance.lock), git read-tree HEAD, git add <paths>, git commit -F. Use this pattern for Items 2-5.

items.title: G20-augment verifier check for adversarial isolation
deliverables: scripts/verify_view_defensibility.py (graduated rigor scale: 8.5-9.0 = v0.3.0 conditions, 9.0+ adds adversarial isolation + model diversity check)
Smoke test 6 branches: v0.3.0 pass, v0.4.0 8.7 no isolation pass, v0.4.0 9.2 no isolation fail, v0.4.0 9.2 same model fail, v0.4.0 9.2 different model pass, v0.4.0 9.5 all conditions met pass
